name: ai-agent-escrow-gateway
description: Local simulation for an AI-agent escrow smart contract gateway.

scripts.simulate:all: npm run simulate:happy && npm run simulate:dispute && npm run simulate:timeout
scripts.live:happy:base-sepolia: npx -y node@22 node_modules/hardhat/internal/cli/cli.js run scripts/liveHappyPathBaseSepolia.js --network baseSepolia
scripts.live:withdraw:base-sepolia: npx -y node@22 node_modules/hardhat/internal/cli/cli.js run scripts/liveWithdrawBaseSepolia.js --network baseSepolia
scripts.deploy:base-sepolia: npx -y node@22 node_modules/hardhat/internal/cli/cli.js run scripts/deployBaseSepolia.js --network baseSepolia
scripts.deploy:base-mainnet: npx -y node@22 node_modules/hardhat/internal/cli/cli.js run scripts/deployBaseMainnet.js --network baseMainnet
